expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering
expectations.evidence: result.md states: "Phase 3 contract explicitly requires Tavily-first deep research and allows Confluence only as a recorded fallback" and cites `reference.md` policy `tavily_first_confluence_second` plus: "tavily-search must run before any confluence fallback and the fallback reason must be recorded." execution_notes.md also says: "Confirmed Phase 3 requires Tavily-first and allows Confluence only as recorded fallback."
